<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Decoders; use SplFileInfo; use Intervention\Image\Exceptions\DecoderException; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ColorInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; class SplFileInfoImageDecoder extends FilePathImageDecoder { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see DecoderInterface::decode() */ public function decode(mixed $input): ImageInterface|ColorInterface { if (!is_a($input, SplFileInfo::class)) { throw new DecoderException('Unable to decode input'); } return parent::decode($input->getRealPath()); } }
